hooks.command: { f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.go) (command -v gofumpt >/dev/null 2>&1 && gofumpt -w "$f" || go run mvdan.cc/gofumpt@latest -w "$f") && (command -v goimports >/dev/null 2>&1 && goimports -w -local github.com/KyaniteHQ/linctl "$f" || go run golang.org/x/tools/cmd/goimports@latest -w -local github.com/KyaniteHQ/linctl "$f") ;; esac ; } 2>/dev/null || true
